etymology.description: phonetic 子 (zǐ) + semantic 攵 (action) -> work with childlike diligence -> diligent
etymology.interpretation: The character 孜 (zī, "diligent") combines the phonetic element 子 (zǐ, "child") with the semantic component 攵, which conveys the idea of action. This suggests the act of being 'diligent' with the youthful energy and persistence characteristic of children.

examples.chinese: 她是个孜孜不倦的学生(她是個孜孜不倦的學生)。
examples.pinyin: Tā shì gè zīzī bù juàn de xuéshēng.

examples.chinese: 他们孜孜不倦地工作(他們孜孜不倦地工作)，希望能如期完成任务(希望能如期完成任務)。
examples.pinyin: Tāmen zīzī bù juàn dì gōngzuò, xīwàng néng rúqī wánchéng rènwù.
examples.english: They work diligently, hoping to complete the task on time.

examples.chinese: 孜孜不倦的态度(孜孜不倦的態度)帮助他取得了成功(幫助他取得了成功)。
examples.pinyin: Zīzī bù juàn de tàidù bāngzhù tā qǔdéle chénggōng.
examples.english: A diligent attitude helped him achieve success.
